description: Move the output assign dropdown from the buried TONE/MISC section to a prominent position in the drum kit per-key controls. Both SN-D (SnDrumEditor.tsx, offset 0x12) and PCM-D (PcmDrumEditor.tsx, offset 0x1B). Infrastructure already exists — purely a UI rearrangement. Replaces i7-18x.6.
title: Per-instrument output assign in drum kit editors
